title: EATP Delegation Record
description: Record of trust delegation from one agent to another.

delegator_id.description: ID of the agent granting delegation

delegatee_id.description: ID of the agent receiving delegation

task_id.description: Task this delegation is scoped to

reasoning_trace.description: Optional structured rationale for this delegation decision

reasoning_trace_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the JCS (RFC 8785)-canonicalized reasoning trace, formatted as 'sha256:<hex-digest>' (lowercase, 64 chars). Always included in the signing payload: the hash value when a reasoning trace is present, null when absent.

reasoning_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical reasoning trace, signed by the delegator
